sourceMovie.title: My First Summer
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto My First Summer (2020) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The drama and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Blue Valentine
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If My First Summer clicked for you, Blue Valentine (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and romance, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after My First Summer?
faq.answer: Try Blue Valentine, All the Bright Places, A Single Man—each shares DNA with My First Summer while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is My First Summer?
faq.answer: My First Summer (2020) is best described as Drama, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is My First Summer worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
